apiContracts.description: Returns the current health status of the application including database connectivity, uptime, and version information. This endpoint will be implemented in Phase 4 using the IHealthService interface.
Returns the current version information including version number, build number, commit hash, and build date. This endpoint will be implemented in Phase 4 using the IVersionService interface.

componentSpecs.name: health.model
componentSpecs.description: Domain model file for the status module. Exports the HealthStatus interface with attributes: isHealthy (boolean), timestamp (Date), version (string), uptimeSeconds (number). Located at src/modules/status/health.model.ts. Follows the pattern established by src/modules/uptime/uptime.model.ts.

props.isHealthy: boolean — whether the application and its dependencies are healthy
props.timestamp: Date — the timestamp when the health check was performed
props.version: string — the current application version string
props.uptimeSeconds: number — how long the application has been running in seconds

componentSpecs.name: version.model
componentSpecs.description: Domain model file for the status module. Exports the VersionInfo interface with attributes: version (string), buildNumber (string), commitHash (string), buildDate (Date). Located at src/modules/status/version.model.ts. Follows the pattern established by src/modules/uptime/uptime.model.ts.

props.version: string — semantic version of the application (e.g. '1.2.3')
props.commitHash: string — git commit hash of the deployed build
props.buildDate: Date — date when the build was produced

componentSpecs.name: health.service.interface
componentSpecs.description: Service interface for health checks. Exports IHealthService with method getHealth(): Promise<HealthStatus>. Imports HealthStatus from ./health.model. Located at src/modules/status/health.service.interface.ts. Follows the pattern established by src/modules/uptime/uptime.service.interface.ts.

props.getHealth: (): Promise<HealthStatus> — returns the current health status of the application asynchronously, checking database connectivity and computing uptime

componentSpecs.name: version.service.interface
componentSpecs.description: Service interface for version information retrieval. Exports IVersionService with method getVersion(): VersionInfo. Imports VersionInfo from ./version.model. Located at src/modules/status/version.service.interface.ts. Follows the pattern established by src/modules/uptime/uptime.service.interface.ts.

props.getVersion: (): VersionInfo — returns the current version information synchronously from build-time configuration

componentSpecs.name: health.repository.interface
componentSpecs.description: Repository interface for health-related data access. Exports IHealthRepository with method checkDatabaseConnection(): Promise<boolean>. Located at src/modules/status/health.repository.interface.ts. This interface will be implemented in Phase 2 to check PostgreSQL connectivity. Follows the repository pattern (GP-001).

props.checkDatabaseConnection: (): Promise<boolean> — checks whether the database connection is alive and returns true if healthy, false otherwise
